qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: GraphQL API has no query depth, complexity, or field duplication limits enabling denial of service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns Apollo GraphQL query depth/complexity limits and Relation resolver amplification, while the advisory concerns JWT audience validation bypass in Google, Apple, and Facebook authentication adapters.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: File download endpoint allows unauthenticated access to uploaded files
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns missing authentication middleware on GET /files routes, while the advisory concerns missing or skipped JWT audience validation in Google, Apple, and Facebook authentication adapters.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause: JWT audience validation bypass in Parse Server's Google, Apple, and Facebook authentication adapters when clientId/appIds audience configuration is missing or not passed to JWT verification.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-x6fw-778m-wr9v describes authentication bypass through JWT audience validation being skipped for Google/Apple when clientId is unset and for Facebook Limited Login when appIds are not passed as the verification audience.
The final session manifest lists graphql-dos-no-query-limits and unauthenticated-file-access as qualifying final findings.
graphql-dos-no-query-limits reports missing GraphQL validationRules/depth/complexity limits in ParseGraphQLServer and Relation resolvers, not JWT auth adapter audience validation.
unauthenticated-file-access reports unauthenticated GET /files route handling before Parse header/session middleware, not JWT auth adapter audience validation.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding was present, so no selected finding or runtime tier is applicable.
